baseline_v3.0.1.note: measured with the pre-v3.1 bench that generated rows (incl. DateTime->modify parsing) inside the timed loop — understates writer throughput by ~10-13%

v3.0.2.note: styled paths measured AFTER hoisting the row style attribute out of the per-cell loop

unstyled.delta_vs_baseline_median: -0.7% (within noise, no regression — path is byte-identical)

v3.1.0.note: bench hygiene fixed first (row generation cost measured via calibration pass and subtracted; DateTime pool outside the loop), then both versions re-measured apples-to-apples with the SAME fixed bench, 5 runs each

changes: fastXmlEscape: strpbrk 34-char needle replaced with PCRE JIT character-class pre-check (clean-string fast path ~5x cheaper)

buildRowXml/buildStyledRowXml: string-first type dispatch, column-letter cache hoisted to a local, direct string append instead of array+implode (sheet XML verified byte-identical against v3.0.2 on an edge-case corpus)
default deflate level 6 -> 5 (measured knee of the size/speed curve for XLSX-shaped XML)

v3.2.0-dev.note: reader-side release: rows(skip) fast path (index seek + '</row>' boundary-scan skip), within-block fast-forward for rowAt/rowRange, blockRanges memoization, groupStats() sorted-group pushdown. New benches: read_bench.php (full-scan rows/s), query_bench.php (query surface). Query/read numbers are 5-run fresh-process medians; before/after skip numbers use the audit 04 in-process methodology on the same fixtures.

skip_fast_path_before_after.fixtures: indexed: 1.1M rows, sync every 10K, stats col 1; no-index: 500K rows

query_1M_rows_sync10K.fixture: 1M rows [ID, Name, Amount, Group], index every 10K, stats cols 1/3/4, Group = 20 sorted duplicate groups
